calendar.matters:
Notice And Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Apr-27-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. Appearances: Malen Phillips (632.0003) defendant and moving party appearing in propria persona. No other appearances. Discussed and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: motion for order for Claim of Exemption is denied. The sheriff is directed collect $100.00 per pay check from Ms. Phillips. Order signed in open court. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported

Notice And Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Apr-14-2011 Continued To Apr-27-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Continued to 4/27/11 for Debtor to provide copy of specific Financial Statement. Debtor to provide copy to Department 302 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Order signed. Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported
